link_info.banner: TI ARM Clang Linker PC v4.0.0.LTS
link_info.command_line: C:\ti\ccstheia151\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS\bin\tiarmlnk -IC:\ti\ccstheia151\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS\lib -o Default_Project.out -mDefault_Project.map --heap_size=0x800 --stack_size=512 -iC:/ti/mspm0_sdk_2_04_00_06/source -iC:/Users/Isaiah/OneDrive - Monroe Community College/Spring 2026/CSC202/Tetris/Default_Project -iC:/Users/Isaiah/OneDrive - Monroe Community College/Spring 2026/CSC202/Tetris/Default_Project/Debug/syscfg -iC:/ti/ccstheia151/ccs/tools/compiler/ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS/lib --diag_wrap=off --display_error_number --warn_sections --xml_link_info=Default_Project_linkInfo.xml --rom_model ./LaunchPad.o ./adc.o ./clock.o ./graphics.o ./lcd.o ./main.o ./spi.o ./uart.o ./ticlang/startup_mspm0g3507_ticlang.o ../mspm0g3507.cmd -llibc.a --start-group -llibc++.a -llibc++abi.a -llibc.a -llibsys.a -llibsysbm.a -llibclang_rt.builtins.a -llibclang_rt.profile.a --end-group --cg_opt_level=0
link_info.title: Link successful
